name: Idaho: deadline for work back injury comp claim?
description: 60 days report, 1 year file in ID—don't wait[2].

mainEntity.name: Idaho: deadline for work back injury comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: 60 days report, 1 year file in ID—don't wait[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report within 60 days to employer, file formal claim within 1 year of injury.** Strict enforcement[2]. **Key factors:** Date symptoms tied to work. **Practical guidance:** Written report, keep copy, start medical right away. Late claims often denied. **Idaho Industrial Commission[2].**
